'''âth-dh-dh''' ('''kathadhadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:camcord|camcord]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-dh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:camcord|camcord]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-dh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kathadhadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithadhadh|thithadhadh]] || [[word:jithadhadh|jithadhadh]] || [[word:shithadhadh|shithadhadh]] || [[word:kithadhadh|kithadhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthadhadh|thuthuthadhadh]] || [[word:jujuthadhadh|jujuthadhadh]] || [[word:shushuthadhadh|shushuthadhadh]] || [[word:kukuthadhadh|kukuthadhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthadhadh|thuthadhadh]] || [[word:juthadhadh|juthadhadh]] || [[word:shuthadhadh|shuthadhadh]] || [[word:kuthadhadh|kuthadhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthadhadh|thuthadhadh]] || [[word:juthadhadh|juthadhadh]] || [[word:shuthadhadh|shuthadhadh]] || [[word:kuthadhadh|kuthadhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethadhadh|thethadhadh]] || [[word:jethadhadh|jethadhadh]] || [[word:shethadhadh|shethadhadh]] || [[word:kethadhadh|kethadhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothadhadh|thothothadhadh]] || [[word:jojothadhadh|jojothadhadh]] || [[word:shoshothadhadh|shoshothadhadh]] || [[word:kokothadhadh|kokothadhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothadhadh|thothadhadh]] || [[word:jothadhadh|jothadhadh]] || [[word:shothadhadh|shothadhadh]] || [[word:kothadhadh|kothadhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothadhadh|thothadhadh]] || [[word:jothadhadh|jothadhadh]] || [[word:shothadhadh|shothadhadh]] || [[word:kothadhadh|kothadhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthadhadh|thĂŠthadhadh]] || [[word:jĂŠthadhadh|jĂŠthadhadh]] || [[word:shĂŠthadhadh|shĂŠthadhadh]] || [[word:kĂŠthadhadh|kĂŠthadhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathadhadh|thathathadhadh]] || [[word:jajathadhadh|jajathadhadh]] || [[word:shashathadhadh|shashathadhadh]] || [[word:kakathadhadh|kakathadhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathadhadh|thathadhadh]] || [[word:jathadhadh|jathadhadh]] || [[word:shathadhadh|shathadhadh]] || [[word:kathadhadh|kathadhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathadhadh|thathadhadh]] || [[word:jathadhadh|jathadhadh]] || [[word:shathadhadh|shathadhadh]] || [[word:kathadhadh|kathadhadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathadhadh|shathadhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathadhadh|goshathadhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathadhadh|gokishathadhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathadhadhnĂŒ|shathadhadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnknĂŒ|goshathadhadhnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhnĂŒ|gokishathadhadhnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathadhadhshĂ«|shathadhadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkshĂ«|goshathadhadhnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhshĂ«|gokishathadhadhshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhadhro|shathadhadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkro|goshathadhadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhro|gokishathadhadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhadhmu|shathadhadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkmu|goshathadhadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhmu|gokishathadhadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathadhadhsher|shathadhadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnksher|goshathadhadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhsher|gokishathadhadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathadhadhng|shathadhadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkng|goshathadhadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhng|gokishathadhadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathadhadhya|shathadhadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkya|goshathadhadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhya|gokishathadhadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathadhadhyam|shathadhadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkyam|goshathadhadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhyam|gokishathadhadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhadhnĂŒshĂ«|shathadhadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnknĂŒshĂ«|goshathadhadhnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhnĂŒshĂ«|gokishathadhadhnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhadhnĂŒro|shathadhadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnknĂŒro|goshathadhadhnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhnĂŒro|gokishathadhadhnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhadhnĂŒmu|shathadhadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnknĂŒmu|goshathadhadhnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhnĂŒmu|gokishathadhadhnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhadhshĂ«nĂŒ|shathadhadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathadhadhnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathadhadhshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhadhshĂ«ro|shathadhadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkshĂ«ro|goshathadhadhnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhshĂ«ro|gokishathadhadhshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhadhshĂ«mu|shathadhadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkshĂ«mu|goshathadhadhnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhshĂ«mu|gokishathadhadhshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhadhronĂŒ|shathadhadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkronĂŒ|goshathadhadhnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhronĂŒ|gokishathadhadhronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhadhroshĂ«|shathadhadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkroshĂ«|goshathadhadhnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhroshĂ«|gokishathadhadhroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathadhadhromu|shathadhadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkromu|goshathadhadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhromu|gokishathadhadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathadhadhmunĂŒ|shathadhadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkmunĂŒ|goshathadhadhnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhmunĂŒ|gokishathadhadhmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathadhadhmushĂ«|shathadhadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkmushĂ«|goshathadhadhnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhmushĂ«|gokishathadhadhmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathadhadhmuro|shathadhadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathadhadhnkmuro|goshathadhadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathadhadhmuro|gokishathadhadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki active verbs]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
